entity.summary: Multi-chain AMM and DEX protocol historically associated with Beethoven X and later Beets branding. HEI treats Beethoven X, Beets, and Beets DEX variant rows as one protocol-level entity for v0.
entity.notes: Added from verified-unadded rows hei_unadded_0213 through hei_unadded_0218 as one entity to avoid duplicate branding, chain, and version records.

events.title: Beethoven X / Beets rows consolidated under Beets
events.description: Beets is recorded as the consolidated protocol-level entity for Beethoven X, Beets, and Beets DEX candidate rows.
events.notes: Replace with a precise rebrand or migration event if stronger sources are added.

evidence.title: Beets official website
evidence.notes: Official domain used to verify current Beets identity.

evidence.title: CoinGecko / CoinPaprika references for Beethoven X and Beets
evidence.notes: Backlog rows hei_unadded_0213-0216 referred to Beethoven X and Beets chain rows.

evidence.title: DefiLlama DEX references for Beets variants
evidence.notes: Backlog rows hei_unadded_0217 and hei_unadded_0218 referred to Beets DEX variants.
